advice.summary: You are currently in the base training phase, focusing on building endurance. Your recent sessions indicate a good mix of easy runs and quality workouts.
advice.focus: Continue to incorporate easy aerobic runs while gradually increasing the intensity of your quality workouts.
advice.nextSession: Plan for an easy run of about 6-8 km at a comfortable pace to maintain aerobic fitness.
advice.caution: Monitor your heart rate during workouts to avoid excessive fatigue.
